basics.name: Marcus Vinicius Vitoratti de Araujo
basics.label: Software Engineer at Logic Controls Inc.
basics.summary: BSc and MSc in Mechatronics and Mechanical Engineering by Latin America’s top university, I am experienced in R&D, especially in the automotive sector, with a solid IT background. Fluent in English and Portuguese, I seek making a difference in the world through developing new concepts, products and services.

work.summary:
Work with KDS apps (Kitchen Display Systems) for Android and iOS, customer web portal and APIs.

- Lead the development of integration between Oracle MICROS Simphony and the KDS apps
- Created 2020 roadmap implementation after competitor's analysis, customer support and sales inputs
- Implemented a new reseller registration process with automatic emails and digital agreement signatures, reducing the burden on the company on spending time on collecting, typing and finding information
- Renewed the software billing report, adding functionalities for edge cases such as price overriding and pro-rated calculation per date and per license changes
- Enabled the translation for the back office portal and KDS Apps
- Provided Portuguese translation of User Manuals, Developer Manuals, Apps user interfaces, Customer portal & API and assisted on the Spanish translation
- Coordinate and design new features
- JIRA Admin
- Develop the customer portal and APIs (PHP, Laravel, MySQL)
- Develop entry-level KDS app for Android
- Coordinate the development of the advanced KDS suite for Android

- Developed mobile apps for Android and iOS platforms on B4x RAD, focused on small to medium-sized companies
- Programmed the app-server integration API (JSON Web Token)
- Developed the client business intelligence control panel (PHP and MySQL)
- Experience with Push notification, Social network login, OAuth, JWT, SSO, Barcode reading, GPS, Bluetooth, Firebase integration (incl. Analytics), Cryptography, Apple provision files and certificates

-	Designed and tested a patented non-invasive capacitive sensor for multi-phase flow
-	Created from scratch the company’s Research, Development & Innovation center with four automated test benches
-	Designed the test software (LabVIEW) and executed the test plans

-	Coordinated a multidisciplinary team to solve a complex Transfer Box safety issue affecting a major military customer, resulting in a successful recall action and improvement in customer relationship
-	Certified in Shainin's RedX®, a statistical engineering problem solving method for complex systems that is complimentary to Six Sigma, used to successfully perform the root cause analysis in the aforementioned issue resolution
-	Awarded Mercedes-Benz 2015’s Star Prize for an automated 1-click report generation tool, used worldwide for quality issue prioritization and risk assessment, saving 480 work-hours per year
-	Developed a workforce planning tool to level the department’s resources according to project demands and justify additional capacity
-	Certified Models and Data Analysis for Reliability Engineering by ReliaSoft, becoming the single consultant for reliability analysis within the R&D division (400+ employees)
-	Certified and experienced in Quality and Lean tools: 5S, A3 (Ishikawa/Fishbone, 5whys), APQP tools (QFD, FMEA, DVP&R, SPC, RCA, 8D), Kanban, KPIs, VSM (Value Stream Mapping), Shainin, SFM/OFM (Shopfloor/Office Floor Management), SIPOC, Poka-Yoke, Spaghetti Diagram and Process Mapping

-	Designed and set up the communication model between Quality Assurance and After Sales, building rapport and improving the issue resolution effectiveness and efficiency
-	Developed a tool for warranty issues prioritization, resolution monitoring and reporting up to COO
-	Responsible for addressing warranty issues in Moving, Interior & Exterior and Body & Paint
-	Obtained comprehensive knowledge of all product lifecycle departments, such as R&D, Stamping, Welding, Painting, Assembly, Quality Control, Logistics, Purchasing and Vehicle Processing

publications.name: Electromagnetic harvester for lateral vibration in rotating machines
publications.summary:
DOI: 10.1016/j.ymssp.2014.07.025

Energy harvesters are devices that convert mechanical energy, usually vibration, into electrical energy that can be used to supply low power circuits (e.g. sensors). In this work, an energy harvester is designed for converting the mechanical energy of the lateral vibrations of shafts into electrical energy. For that, permanent magnets are mounted in the shaft and coils are mounted in a fixed structure. A configuration analysis is performed to find the appropriated polarization of the magnets and orientation of the coils in order to have electromagnetic induction without resisting torque on the shaft. Experimental tests are done for different electrical configurations of the coils: independent, in series and, in parallel. The results show that more electric power is induced when the coils are connected in series, and vibration reduction is more evident when the coils are connected independently.

publications.name: Energy Harvesting From Unbalance Response of Rotors
publications.publisher: 9th IFToMM International Conference on Rotor Dynamics, 2014, Milan, Italy, v. 1, p. 1-9

publications.name: Motor drive for a low cost electric wheelchair
publications.publisher: Biblioteca Digital de Trabalhos Acadêmicos da USP
publications.summary: This work shows the development of the hardware and the software of a DC motor driver used in a battery-powered, joystick-controlled wheelchair, regarding the socioeconomic side. Hardware is divided into control electronics, consisting primarily of a microcontroller and power electronics, consisting of transistors, relays, automotive battery and DC motors. Software is responsible for reading the commands sent by a joystick and hence for driving and reversal of the motors, taking all the proper safety precautions.

references.name: Marcelo Montanha de Oliveira
references.reference: Marcos is an excellent young fellow, very dedicated to his starting professional career. His consistent technical knowledge acquired in one of the best Brazilian Universities allied to a very proactive and willing to learn determination will certainly lead him to a bright future in the high tech entrepreneurial environment, Thus, I do recommend him.
